Removed_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for players to interact with error messages.

Added_Other.name: FFlagBetterDxtCheck_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements improved checks for texture compression formats.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances visual quality of textures in games for a better player experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFFlagEnableSquadLobbyUpsellCardShortScreenFix_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes display issues with the squad lobby upsell card on smaller screens.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures players can easily see and understand the upsell card, enhancing their experience.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic retrieval of version information from the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates dynamic strings with timestamps more efficiently.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy and responsiveness of time-related text in games.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and efficiency in tracking game updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed as strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed and efficiency of displaying timestamps in the game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAppChatFixCustomConversationListEntryTransparency_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the transparency settings for custom chat conversation entries.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves visibility and usability of chat conversations in the app.

Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Enhances user experience by preventing menus from losing focus when an error occurs.
